productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteCasual mid-top styling on a formal cut, this shoe from U.S. Polo Association showcases the brand's commitment to quality and innovation. This shoe can either be worn with your casual ensembles - style it with a plaid shirt, a monochrome tee and denims, or dress it up for semi-formal occasions with fitted, clean-look denims, a crisp shirt and a blazer!Product DetailsBlack monk style shoe with perforations on the forefoot, overlays and a buckle detail on the tonguePadded tongue and innerUpper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with branded groove on the forefoot and a stacked heelThe shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
